---
title: "Narin Güran | Who Killed Her?"
date: 2025-05-28
author: "Mind Vorteks"
image: cover.jpg
description: "One of the most controversial murders in Turkey. The court found the family guilty and sentenced them to life imprisonment — but what is the truth? Has justice been served?"
categories: [Documentary]
featured: true
toc: false
listing:
  - id: siblings
    contents:
      - "../*/index.qmd"
    type: table
    sort: "date desc"
    fields: [title, date]
    table-striped: false
    table-hover: false
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
    feed: false
---

::: {.column-margin}
**Other videos in this category**

::: {#siblings}
:::
:::

{{< video2 https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=LAe1zoOdF1c >}}

## Description

One of the most controversial murders in Turkey. The court found the family guilty and sentenced them to life imprisonment — but what is the truth? Has justice been served?

**Channel:** [Mind Vorteks](https://www.youtube.com/@Mindvorteks)
**Release date:** 28 May 2025
